<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    auto data = buffer;
    
    // Read packet_id
    uint32_t packet_id = hexi::read<uint32_t>(data);
    
    // Read username (length-prefixed)
    auto [username, new_data] = hexi::prefixed(data);
    data = new_data;
    
    // Read scores count and vector
    uint32_t scores_count = hexi::read<uint32_t>(data);
    auto [scores, remaining] = hexi::read_container<uint32_t>(data, scores_count);
    data = remaining;
    
    // Read metadata (null-terminated)
    auto [metadata, meta_remaining] = hexi::null_terminated(data);
    data = meta_remaining;
    
    // Skip any remaining padding
    // Padding is ignored as per requirements
    
    return NetworkPacket{packet_id, username, scores, metadata};
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    auto data = buffer;
    
    // Get packet_id via span (zero-copy)
    uint32_t packet_id = hexi::read<uint32_t>(data);
    
    // Read username length and create string_view
    uint32_t username_len = hexi::read<uint32_t>(data);
    std::string_view username(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data.data()), username_len);
    data = data.subspan(username_len);
    
    // Read scores count and skip the scores data
    uint32_t scores_count = hexi::read<uint32_t>(data);
    data = data.subspan(scores_count * sizeof(uint32_t));
    
    // Skip metadata (null-terminated)
    const uint8_t* meta_start = data.data();
    const uint8_t* meta_end = meta_start;
    while (*meta_end != 0 && meta_end < data.data() + data.size()) {
        ++meta_end;
    }
    data = std::span<const uint8_t>(meta_end + 1, data.data() + data.size() - (meta_end + 1 - data.data()));
    
    return PacketInfo{packet_id, username};
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct UserData {
    uint64_t user_id;
    uint8_t age;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream(user_id, age, name);
    }
};

UserData deserialize_user_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);

    return data;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_buffer_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_peek) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(bytes_to_peek);
    adaptor.copy(result.data(), bytes_to_peek);
    return result;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstddef>

// Assuming hexi::Buffer is a class that wraps std::vector and provides
// read/write pointer access and space checking.
const uint8_t* get_read_pointer(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::Buffer hexi_buf(buffer);
    return hexi_buf.read_ptr();
}

uint8_t* get_write_pointer(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::Buffer hexi_buf(buffer);
    return hexi_buf.write_ptr();
}

struct BufferInfo {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo check_buffer_space(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::Buffer hexi_buf(buffer);
    return {
        hexi_buf.readable_size(),
        hexi_buf.free_space()
    };
}
```</answer>

            stream >> item;
        }
    } else {

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

PacketHeader read_header_with_span(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());

    if (adaptor.check_available(8) != hexi::buffer_state::ok) {

        return PacketHeader{};
    }

    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    // Read each field from the binary stream
    stream >> header.magic;
    stream >> header.version;
    stream >> header.flags;
    
    return header;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor(user_id, name);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::BufferAdaptor adaptor(buffer);
    adaptor(header);
    data.serialise(adaptor);
    return buffer;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    uint32_t header;
    adaptor.read(&header, sizeof(header));
    
    auto remaining = std::span<const uint8_t>(
        buffer.data() + adaptor.position(),
        buffer.size() - adaptor.position()
    );
    
    size_t null_pos = 0;
    while (null_pos < remaining.size() && remaining[null_pos] != 0) {
        ++null_pos;
    }
    
    std::string_view message(
        reinterpret_cast<const char*>(remaining.data()),
        null_pos
    );
    
    return MessagePacket{header, message};
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstring>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    // Write the header (4 bytes)
    const uint8_t* header_bytes = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&header);
    buffer.write(header_bytes, sizeof(header));
    
    // Write the data array
    if (!data.empty()) {
        buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
    }
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

BufferData<> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<1024>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    BufferData<> result;
    
    // Reset to the beginning of the buffer
    buffer.seek(0);
    
    // Read the header (4 bytes)
    uint8_t header_bytes[4];
    buffer.read(header_bytes, 4);
    std::memcpy(&result.header, header_bytes, 4);
    
    // Read the data array
    result.data.resize(data_length);
    if (data_length > 0) {
        buffer.read(result.data.data(), data_length);
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/tls_block_allocator.h>
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
using tls_allocator_type = hexi::tls_block_allocator<hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>, allocator_count>;

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
void enter_thread_with_allocator(tls_allocator_type<block_size, allocator_count>& allocator) {
    // Initialize the TLS allocator for the current thread
    allocator.initialize();
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
void exit_thread_with_allocator(tls_allocator_type<block_size, allocator_count>& allocator) {
    // Clean up the TLS allocator for the current thread
    allocator.cleanup();
}
```</answer>

#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    size_t bytes_copied = 0;
    size_t current_offset = storage.read_offset;
    size_t available_data = storage.write_offset - storage.read_offset;
    size_t bytes_to_copy = std::min(bytes_to_preview, available_data);

    while (bytes_copied < bytes_to_copy) {
        auto block = storage.get_block_at_offset(current_offset);
        size_t pos_in_block = current_offset % block_size;
        size_t remaining_in_block = block_size - pos_in_block;
        size_t bytes_needed = bytes_to_copy - bytes_copied;
        size_t bytes_this_iteration = std::min({remaining_in_block, bytes_needed});

        const uint8_t* source = block->data + pos_in_block;
        result.insert(result.end(), source, source + bytes_this_iteration);
        
        bytes_copied += bytes_this_iteration;
        current_offset += bytes_this_iteration;
    }

    return result;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
BufferStatus<> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    BufferStatus<> status;
    status.readable_size = storage.write_offset - storage.read_offset;
    status.free_space = storage.block_size() - (storage.write_offset % storage.block_size());
    return status;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.read_offset = 0;
    storage.write_offset = 0;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>
#include <stdexcept>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    hexi::file_buffer file;
    try {
        file.open(file_path.string().c_str(), "rb");
    } catch (const std::exception& e) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file for reading: " + std::string(e.what()));
    }

    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer(bytes_to_read);
    size_t bytes_read = 0;
    try {
        bytes_read = file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(buffer.data()), bytes_to_read);
    } catch (const std::exception& e) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to read file: " + std::string(e.what()));
    }

    buffer.resize(bytes_read);
    return buffer;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    hexi::file_buffer file;
    try {
        file.open(file_path.string().c_str(), "rb");
    } catch (const std::exception& e) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file for previewing: " + std::string(e.what()));
    }

    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer(bytes_to_preview);
    size_t bytes_copied = 0;
    try {
        bytes_copied = file.copy(reinterpret_cast<char*>(buffer.data()), bytes_to_preview);
    } catch (const std::exception& e) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to preview file: " + std::string(e.what()));
    }

    buffer.resize(bytes_copied);
    return buffer;
}

void write_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    hexi::file_buffer file;
    try {
        file.open(file_path.string().c_str(), "wb");
    } catch (const std::exception& e) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file for writing: " + std::string(e.what()));
    }

    if (!data.empty()) {
        try {
            file.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data.data()), data.size());
        } catch (const std::exception& e) {
            throw std::runtime_error("Failed to write to file: " + std::string(e.what()));
        }
    }
}

size_t get_file_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer file;
    try {
        file.open(file_path.string().c_str(), "rb");
    } catch (const std::exception& e) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file for size checking: " + std::string(e.what()));
    }

    try {
        file.seek(0, hexi::file_buffer::seek_end);
    } catch (const std::exception& e) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to seek to end of file: " + std::string(e.what()));
    }

    return file.tell();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_header(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t header_size) {

    file.open(file_path, hexi::file_buffer::in);

        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file");
    }

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size() && i < buffer_size; ++i) {
        buffer[i] = static_cast<std::byte>(data[i]);
    }
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    for (size_t i = 0; i < bytes_to_read && i < buffer_size; ++i) {
        result.push_back(static_cast<uint8_t>(buffer[i]));
    }
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
struct BufferInfo {
    size_t capacity;
    size_t current_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo<> get_buffer_info(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, 1024>& buffer) {
    return BufferInfo<>{
        .capacity = 1024,
        .current_size = buffer.size(),
        .free_space = 1024 - buffer.size()
    };
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
const std::byte* get_read_pointer(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer) {
    return buffer.read_ptr();
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::byte* get_write_pointer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer) {
    return buffer.write_ptr();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    std::size_t bytes_written = 0;
    auto unsigned_val = static_cast<std::make_unsigned_t<T>>(value);
    while (unsigned_val > 0x7F) {
        uint8_t byte = static_cast<uint8_t>(unsigned_val & 0x7F) | 0x80;
        writer.write(&byte, 1);
        unsigned_val >>= 7;
        bytes_written++;
    }
    uint8_t byte = static_cast<uint8_t>(unsigned_val & 0x7F);
    writer.write(&byte, 1);
    return ++bytes_written;
}

template<typename T>
T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    T result = 0;
    int shift = 0;
    uint8_t byte;
    do {
        reader.read(&byte, 1);
        result |= static_cast<T>(byte & 0x7F) << shift;
        shift += 7;
    } while (byte & 0x80);
    return result;
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer writer(adaptor);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader reader(adaptor);

    // Encode the original value
    std::size_t bytes_written = encode_varint(writer, original_value);
    // Reset the reader to the beginning
    reader.seek(0);

    // Compare
    return decoded_value == original_value;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

std::string read_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream) {
    std::string result;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(result);
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<std::size_t Size>
constexpr auto create_filled_array(std::uint8_t value) {
    return generate_filled<Size>(value);
}

bool verify_filled_array(const auto& arr, std::uint8_t expected_value) {
    for (const auto& element : arr) {
        if (element != expected_value) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    ExceptionDetails details;
    details.read_size = e.read_size;
    details.total_read = e.total_read;
    details.limit_or_size = e.buff_size;
    details.message = e.what();
    return details;
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    ExceptionDetails details;
    details.read_size = e.read_size;
    details.total_read = e.total_read;
    details.limit_or_size = e.read_limit;
    details.message = e.what();
    return details;
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return e.what();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator allocator;
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer, allocator);
    hexi::stream stream(adaptor);

    // Write header
    stream << packet.header;
    
    // Write data length as uint32_t
    uint32_t data_length = static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data.length());
    stream << data_length;
    
    // Write data bytes

    stream.fill<16>(0x00);

    stream << packet.footer;

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator allocator;
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer, allocator);
    hexi::stream stream(adaptor);

    // Write header
    stream << packet.header;
    
    // Write data length as uint32_t
    uint32_t data_length = static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data.length());
    stream << data_length;
    
    // Write data bytes
    stream.write(packet.data.data(), packet.data.length());
    
    // Write 16 bytes of padding filled with 0x00
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);
    
    // Write footer
    stream << packet.footer;

    return buffer;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <vector>
#include <memory>

struct PoolObject {
    int id;
    double value;
    
    // Default constructor required by block_allocator
    PoolObject() : id(0), value(0.0) {}
    
    PoolObject(int i, double v) : id(i), value(v) {}
};

std::vector<PoolObject*> create_object_pool(hexi::block_allocator<PoolObject, 10>& allocator) {
    std::vector<PoolObject*> objects;
    objects.push_back(allocator.allocate(1, 3.14));
    objects.push_back(allocator.allocate(2, 6.28));
    objects.push_back(allocator.allocate(3, 9.42));
    return objects;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    std::size_t size() const override {
        return data_.size();
    }
    
    bool empty() const override {
        return data_.empty();
    }
    
    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <memory>

struct TypedData {
    uint32_t id;
    int16_t value;
    double ratio;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_typed_data(const TypedData& data) {
    auto buffer = std::make_unique<std::vector<uint8_t>>();
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer.get());
    adaptor.write(data.id);
    adaptor.write(data.value);
    adaptor.write(data.ratio);
    return *buffer;
}

TypedData read_typed_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    TypedData data;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    adaptor.read(&data.id);
    adaptor.read(&data.value);
    adaptor.read(&data.ratio);
    return data;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    
    // Convert message_id to big-endian and write
    uint32_t be_message_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.write(&be_message_id, sizeof(be_message_id));
    
    // Convert data_values to big-endian and write container
    std::vector<uint16_t> be_data_values;
    be_data_values.reserve(packet.data_values.size());
    for (auto val : packet.data_values) {
        be_data_values.push_back(hexi::endian::native_to_big(val));
    }
    stream.write_container(be_data_values);
    
    // Convert checksum to big-endian and write
    uint32_t be_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.write(&be_checksum, sizeof(be_checksum));
    
    return buffer.data();
}
```

    stream.read(&be_checksum, sizeof(be_checksum));

}

    const uint8_t* msg_id_bytes = static_cast<const uint8_t*>(stream.span(4));
    uint32_t be_message_id;
    std::memcpy(&be_message_id, msg_id_bytes, sizeof(be_message_id));
    header.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_message_id);
    
    // Skip the first 4 bytes
    stream.skip(4);
    
    return header;
}
```

But how does the span() method work here? The binary_stream's span() method returns a pointer to the current read position. We then copy those bytes into a uint32_t, convert to native, and skip them.

But this assumes that the stream's span() method returns a pointer to the current position. The exact implementation depends on the Hexi library's API.

Putting it all together, the code would look like this.
output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <cstring>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    
    // Convert message_id to big-endian and write
    uint32_t be_message_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.write(&be_message_id, sizeof(be_message_id));
    
    // Convert each element in data_values to big-endian and write container
    std::vector<uint16_t> be_data_values;
    for (auto val : packet.data_values) {
        be_data_values.push_back(hexi::endian::native_to_big(val));
    }
    stream.write_container(be_data_values);
    
    // Convert checksum to big-endian and write
    uint32_t be_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.write(&be_checksum, sizeof(be_checksum));
    
    return buffer.data();
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    
    // Read message_id and convert to native
    uint32_t be_message_id;
    stream.read(&be_message_id, sizeof(be_message_id));
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_message_id);
    
    // Read count of data_values and convert to native
    uint32_t be_count;
    stream.read(&be_count, sizeof(be_count));
    uint32_t count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_count);
    
    // Read data_values container
    std::vector<uint16_t> be_data_values(count);
    stream.read_container(be_data_values);
    
    // Convert each element to native
    for (auto& val : be_data_values) {
        val = hexi::endian::big_to_native(val);
    }
    packet.data_values = std::move(be_data_values);
    
    // Read checksum and convert to native
    uint32_t be_checksum;
    stream.read(&be_checksum, sizeof(be_checksum));
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_checksum);
    
    return packet;
}

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    ProtocolHeader header;
    
    // Get a span of the first 4 bytes for message_id
    const void* msg_id_ptr = stream.span(4);
    uint32_t be_message_id;
    std::memcpy(&be_message_id, msg_id_ptr, sizeof(be_message_id));
    header.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_message_id);
    
    // Skip the header bytes
    stream.skip(4);
    
    return header;
}

For serialization, we need to use the `conditional_reverse` function with runtime parameters. The idea is that when serializing, we convert from native to little-endian. So for each float in temperatures and the double pressure, we apply `conditional_reverse` with `std::endian::native` as the source and `std::endian::little` as the target. Then write them to the stream.

But wait, the vector's size also needs to be written. Oh right, because when deserializing, we need to know how many temperatures to read. So the serialization should first write the size of the temperatures vector, then each element.

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) const {
        adaptor.write(sensor_id);
        adaptor.write(static_cast<uint32_t>(temperatures.size()));
        for (float temp : temperatures) {
            float le_temp = hexi::conditional_reverse(temp, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
            adaptor.write(le_temp);
        }
        double le_pressure = hexi::conditional_reverse(pressure, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
        adaptor.write(le_pressure);
    }
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor.read(sensor_id);
        uint32_t size;
        adaptor.read(size);
        temperatures.resize(size);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
            float temp;
            adaptor.read(temp);
            hexi::little_to_native_inplace(temp);
            temperatures[i] = temp;
        }
        adaptor.read(pressure);
        hexi::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_measurement_data(const MeasurementData& data) {
    hexi::buffer buf;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buf);
    data.serialise(adaptor);
    return buf.data();
}

MeasurementData deserialize_measurement_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    MeasurementData data;
    adaptor.deserialise(data);
    return data;
}

struct SensorInfo {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::string_view sensor_name;
};

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    std::string_view name = adaptor.view();
    adaptor.enforce_read_bounds(sizeof(uint32_t));
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    adaptor.read(sensor_id);
    adaptor.skip(adaptor.bytes_remaining());
    return {sensor_id, name};
}
